mapper.insert: insert into hc_doc_bill_ref ( id, tenant_id, biz_domain, ref_type, src_bill_kind, src_bill_id, src_bill_no, src_entry_id, src_entry_line_no, tgt_bill_kind, tgt_bill_id, tgt_bill_no, tgt_entry_id, line_no, ref_qty, ref_amt, lock_warehouse_id, lock_supplier_id, lock_department_id, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{id}, #{tenantId}, #{bizDomain}, #{refType}, #{srcBillKind}, #{srcBillId}, #{srcBillNo}, #{srcEntryId}, #{srcEntryLineNo}, #{tgtBillKind}, #{tgtBillId}, #{tgtBillNo}, #{tgtEntryId}, #{lineNo}, #{refQty}, #{refAmt}, #{lockWarehouseId}, #{lockSupplierId}, #{lockDepartmentId}, #{remark}, IFNULL(#{delFlag}, 0), #{createBy}, now() )
mapper.update: update hc_doc_bill_ref set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_by = #{deleteBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and tgt_bill_id = #{tgtBillId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null)
mapper.select: select r.src_entry_id as srcEntryId, sum(case when ifnull(b.bill_status, 0) = 2 and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) then ifnull(r.ref_qty, 0) else 0 end) as auditedQty, sum(case when (ifnull(b.bill_status, 0) != 2 or b.id is null) and (b.del_flag is null or b.del_flag != 1) then ifnull(r.ref_qty, 0) else 0 end) as pendingQty from hc_doc_bill_ref r left join stk_io_bill b on b.tenant_id = r.tenant_id and b.id = cast(nullif(trim(r.tgt_bill_id), '') as unsigned) where r.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and r.src_bill_id = #{srcBillId} and r.ref_type = #{refType} and (r.del_flag = 0 or r.del_flag is null) group by r.src_entry_id
